members.label: floor pattern
members.description: transition trim at step edges (white trim)
members.long_form_open_description: White-painted base trim and stair nosing trim visible at the edge of the carpeted steps; trim creates a distinct horizontal edge and provides contrast to beige carpeting.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs along base of wall and outlines the stair risers
